displayName: Call of Duty trailer benchmark fixture
description: Repo-local benchmark fixture for the canonical cod-test acceptance asset.
notes: This fixture is the MVP source-owned scaffold for the truth benchmark system.
Truth artifacts are JSON-only and must preserve schema parity with real pipeline outputs.
The initial dialogue/music truth files were bootstrapped from the current cod-test artifact set so the runner has durable source-controlled inputs before full editorial review.

Dialogue truth now includes a first human-reviewed pass captured directly in truth/dialogue-data.json, with provenance boundaries documented in docs/cod-test-dialogue-truth-provenance-2026-03-30.md instead of adding comparator-facing schema drift to the truth payload.
Those truth files should be human-reviewed and tightened over time; comparator semantics remain in benchmark.json + runner code, not inside the truth payloads.
Recommendation benchmarking is now included as bootstrap truth with comparator-owned skips for volatile metadata (generatedAt and ai debug/usage payloads).
Chunk-analysis benchmarking is now included using bootstrap truth copied from output/cod-test/phase2-process/chunk-analysis.json; it is not yet a human-reviewed gold truth artifact.

Chunk-analysis benchmarking ignores volatile token-usage fields (chunks[*].tokens and totalTokens) via comparator-owned ignorePaths instead of pretending reviewed truth exists for those unstable values.
Metrics benchmarking is now included using bootstrap truth copied from output/cod-test/phase3-report/metrics/metrics.json; it is not yet a human-reviewed gold truth artifact.
Metrics benchmarking ignores only generatedAt via comparator-owned ignorePaths because generation timestamp volatility is operational metadata rather than reviewed semantic truth.

Emotional-analysis benchmarking is now included using bootstrap truth copied from output/cod-test/phase3-report/emotional-analysis/emotional-data.json; it is not yet a human-reviewed gold truth artifact.

Emotional-analysis benchmarking focuses on deterministic structural/category/numeric fields and skips only generatedAt plus criticalMoments[*].context via comparator-owned ignorePaths, rather than pretending long-form explanatory prose is reviewed semantic truth.
